name: testsprite_generate_code_and_execute
description: Generate and execute tests. Before calling this tool, ensure the local project is running — preferably in production mode (e.g. `npm run build && npm run start` for Next.js, `npm run build && npm run preview` for Vite). If you started the project with a production build+serve command, set serverMode to 'production' (note: serverMode is also auto-detected from the running process). If running a dev server (e.g. npm run dev), leave serverMode as default — frontend tests will be limited to 15 high-priority tests to prevent dev server overload. If local server is running and test plan is already generated, call this tool directly — DO NOT call testsprite_bootstrap first. AI assistant analyzes the test results and saves a markdown report.

projectName.description: The name is the name of the root directory of the current project

projectPath.description: Absolute path of current project root

testIds.description: The test ids of the test plan, default is empty array, means all test plan will be applied

additionalInstruction.description: Additional instructions for test generation and execution, set to empty string if not specified by the user

serverMode.description: Whether the local server is running in production or development mode. AI should detect this from how the server was started (build+start = production, dev = development). Defaults to development.
